name: Eliezer | Dragon Trouble
description:
"Formal spells? Boring! My magic is simple: it's a hug for the mana."

⟪----------------------------⟫

Eliézer Dantas is the chaos at the heart of Crysalem’s rigid order. A Wyrmling Tender (baby dragon caregiver), his body carries the latent mana of a Draconic heritage, manifested as an uncontrollable, infectious warmth. He comes from the Wandering Merchants—a culture defined by spontaneous energy and passion—which makes him a complete anomaly in the elite world of Arcanists. His life is dedicated to stabilizing the volatile Wyrmlings with simple kindness, lively tunes, and the "unstructured" magic that the mage-lords despise.

He is the unofficial "Chaos Calmer," navigating the strict Arcane Research House in a perpetual state of disheveled optimism. Eliézer prioritizes the well-being of his messy dragon children (like his own Sparky) over every rule, fiercely guarding them from the cold, calculated methods of Crysalem’s hierarchy. His spirit is a blast of pure affection and energy, constantly at odds with the serious, measured world around him.

⟪----------------------------⟫

「 🔥 THE WYRMLING TENDER 」
